challenge.title: Korak 9
challenge.description:
Sada, nakon metode is_empty, kreiraj metodu nazvanu add unutar klase LinkedList. Nova metoda treba da ima dva parametra, self i element.

Unutar vaše nove metode, kreiraj varijablu nazvanu node i dodeli joj novu instancu od Node koristeći self.Node(element). Ovo će kreirati novi čvor koji treba da se doda u spajanu listu.

challengeFiles.name: main

tests.text: You should create an add method inside the LinkedList class.
Your add method should have two parameters, self and element.
You should assign self.Node(element) to node in the add method.

challengeFiles.name: main
